EMINEUS
Career Consulting · Advisory Only · Since 2005
The world moves for those who plan.
🇮🇳 FOR INDIAN CITIZENS ONLY
Where are you headed? — Choose your destination.
Your potential is not the problem. The plan is.
Set your target · Upskill precisely · Move when ready · EMINEUS builds the plan
💔
Feeling compromised for years — not because you failed, but because nobody showed you the next step
You delivered every time. You never complained. And yet — the promotion went elsewhere. The hike felt like an insult.

The truth nobody tells you: your company is not against you. They promote the people who made themselves impossible to overlook. That is a skill. It can be learned.

The top 3% set one target every year — a specific title, at a specific salary — then upskill precisely for that target. Not randomly. Precisely.
"You were not born to be overlooked. You just needed the right plan."
⏰
Work-life balance destroyed — slowly, year by year, deadline by deadline
First it was staying late once. Then Sundays on standby. Then weekends disappeared. Then evenings disappeared. Then you stopped noticing.

Your company did not steal your life. The culture asked — and you said yes every time. Because you did not have a better option lined up.

People with options say no. People with a plan have options. The top 3% plan their next life — a company that respects their time as much as their output.
"The right career gives you both a salary and a life."
🚀
Don't be afraid of changing your job — be afraid of staying where your growth stopped
Loyalty is a virtue. Staying where you stopped growing is not loyalty — it is fear dressed up as comfort.

Your company gave you experience. A foundation. Be grateful for that. And then — when the time is right — use that foundation to build something bigger.

Job switching delivers 20–40% salary growth. Annual increments deliver 9%. The gap is not disloyalty. The gap is the difference between a career that drifts and one that moves with intention.
"Changing jobs is not giving up. It is growing up — professionally."
📌
A note from EMINEUS — Your company is doing its best. Every good organisation wants its employees to grow. But here is what no company can do for you: they cannot upskill you into a position you have not prepared for. They cannot promote you to a role your CV does not yet reflect. They cannot pay you what the market gives you if you have not positioned yourself at market rate. The gap between where you are and where you deserve to be is not your company's fault. It is not your fault either. It is simply a gap — and gaps can be closed with the right skills, the right positioning, and a clear annual target. That is what EMINEUS is here for.

From 🇮🇳 BHARAT to 🇦🇪 GULF
From 🇮🇳 Bharat · 🇦🇪 Gulf · 🌍 Europe
From 🇮🇳 Bharat · 🇦🇪 Gulf · 🌏 Australia

Same designation. Same salary. Same frustration.
The calendar changes — but nothing else does.

Somewhere along the way — your career stopped moving.
Not because you stopped working.
Because nobody gave you a real plan.

EMINEUS changes that.
One strategy. One roadmap. One decision that changes everything.

Your career is not behind schedule.
It just hasn't been planned properly — yet.

Same role. Same company. Same ceiling.
But the Gulf is a different story.

UAE · KSA · Bahrain · Oman · Qatar · Kuwait.
Tax-free income. International exposure. Real career growth.

AED 10,000/month tax-free = ₹18 LPA India equivalent.
The opportunity exists — but most never get a real plan.

EMINEUS GCC changes that.
One strategy. One roadmap. One decision that changes everything.

Your Gulf career is not out of reach.
It just hasn't been planned properly — yet.

Same experience. Same hard work. Same India ceiling.
But Europe is a different story.

Germany needs 400,000 skilled workers every year.
Netherlands, Luxembourg, Switzerland — all hiring.
The EU Blue Card exists for professionals exactly like you.

Most professionals never make it to Europe —
not because they lack the skills.
Because nobody built them a real roadmap.

EMINEUS Europe changes that.
Phase 1 — Build your foundation in GCC.
Phase 2 — Cross into Europe with the right CV,
the right language, the right visa.

Your Europe dream is not too big.
It just hasn't been planned properly — yet.

Same skills. Same experience. Same frustration.
But Australia works differently.

It is not about who you know.
It is about how many points you have.

189 · 190 · 491 — the skilled migration visas
that can permanently change your life.
Sydney · Melbourne · Brisbane · Perth — all hiring.

Most professionals never apply —
not because they don't qualify.
Because nobody told them exactly where they stand.

EMINEUS Australia changes that.
Phase 1 — Build your foundation in GCC.
Phase 2 — Apply to Australia with the right points,
the right skills assessment, the right state nomination.

Your Australia dream is not too far.
It just hasn't been planned properly — yet.

Who this is for

I help people who feel stuck

🎓

Fresh Graduates

Age 22–26. Just entered workforce. Need a clear 3–5 year career plan and first direction.

💼

Working Professionals

Age 26–35. Stuck in same role for years. Want to grow to Manager or Senior Manager level.

🏦

Insurance & Finance People

Working in operations, back office, reconciliation, compliance or finance. Want recognition.

✈️

Gulf Aspirants

Age 28–40. Dreaming of UAE, KSA, Bahrain or Oman. Need complete relocation career plan.

📄

CV Crisis People

Applied to 100+ jobs with no response. CV not ATS compatible. Need professional rebuild.

🔄

The Gulf Returnee

Years of Gulf experience. Back in India. Finding that the job market doesn't recognise what you built abroad. Time to change that narrative.

Who this is for

I help Indian professionals who are ready for Europe

🎓

The Ambitious Fresher

Age 22–26. Just starting out. Europe feels like a dream. EMINEUS gives you the exact 5-year plan — GCC first, Europe next.

🌍

The Europe Dreamer

Age 26–35. Stable job. Good experience. But India feels like a ceiling. You want Europe — but don't know where to start.

🏦

Insurance & Finance Professional

Working in operations, back office, compliance or finance. Your skills are in demand across Germany, Netherlands and Luxembourg — you just need the right positioning.

🇦🇪

The GCC Professional

Already in UAE, KSA or Bahrain. 3+ years experience. Ready for the next level. Europe is the logical next step — and GCC is your bridge.

📄

The CV Crisis Person

Applied internationally with zero response. Your India or GCC CV format is not Europe-compatible. Needs a complete rebuild.

🗣️

The Language Planner

Committed to learning German, Dutch or French. Needs a structured plan — certifications, language, visa — all mapped together.

Who this is for

I help Indian professionals who are targeting Australia PR

🎓

The Long-Term Planner

Age 22–28. Just starting out. Australia PR feels far but is very achievable. EMINEUS gives you the exact 5 year plan — GCC first, Australia next.

🌏

The Australia Dreamer

Age 26–38. Good experience. English fluent. But don't know the points system, which visa to target or how close you actually are.

🏦

Insurance & Finance Professional

Working in operations, back office, compliance or finance. Australia's BFSI sector in Sydney and Melbourne actively hires Indian professionals.

🇦🇪

The GCC Professional

Already in UAE, KSA or Bahrain. 3+ years experience. Tax-free savings built. Australia PR is the next logical destination — GCC is your bridge.

📊

The Points Calculator

Knows about the points system but confused about skills assessment, EOI, state nomination and which visa — 189, 190 or 491 — suits your profile.

👨‍👩‍👧

The Family Mover

Not just a job — a life change. Wants to understand family migration, spouse points, cost of living by city and which state is best for long-term settlement.

My expertise areas

7 domains. Every one lived — not studied.

19 years of real experience across these 7 sectors. My guidance is practical — not theoretical. IT, Sales and Marketing excluded.

🛡️

Insurance Operations

Motor Insurance (GCV, PCV, 2W, Private Car) · Policy Administration · Pay-in & Retention Management · Insurer Grid Validation · Endorsement Processing · Claims Coordination · Policy Onboarding · SLA Management · Process Improvement

💰

Finance & Accounts

Accounts Receivable Management · Cash & Bank Reconciliation · Month-end Closing · MIS Reporting · Partner Commission & Payables · Expense Provisions · Fixed Assets Accounting · Credit Float Management · Direct & Indirect Tax Accounting · VAT Awareness

🏦

Banking & BFSI

Banking Operations · Financial Services · Premium Collections · Bank Reconciliation · 64VB Reconciliation · Cheque Dishonour Resolution · PDA Reconciliation · Partner Payout Management · Compliance and Regulatory Frameworks

⚙️

Back Office Operations

Policy Administration · Pay-in & Retention Operations · Back-document Management · Reverse Reconciliation · Cancelled Policy Management · Portal Governance · ATC Process & Same-day Payouts · Credit Float Management · Commission Governance · Partner Onboarding · CMS Operations · Internal Audit Coordination

📡

Telecom Operations

Bharti Airtel — India & 18 International Markets · Global VAS Operations — SMS, News, Gaming · Multinational Reconciliation across 15 OpCos · INR 2,200 Cr+ Partner Financial Operations · DTH Service & Payout Management · Open-item Reconciliation — 350 Companies · Revenue Insight Reporting

🔐

Risk, Compliance & Governance

Risk Management & Fraud Control · CBUAE · DFSA · IRDA Compliance · Internal Audit Management · Regulatory Adherence · Governance Frameworks · AML Awareness · Revenue Leakage Control · 64VB Verification · Payment Mode Accuracy

🤝

Partner & Broker Management

Broker Management · Partner Onboarding & Relationship Management · Broker & Insurer Coordination · Multi-country Partner Engagement · Commission Governance · CMS Operations · Reinsurance Operations Awareness · Client Servicing · Digital Transformation Support

WHO THIS IS FOR

"Most professionals at this level are not stuck because of lack of skill. They are stuck because nobody ever told them how to position themselves for the next level."

This package is for the Senior Manager who has delivered results for years — but is still waiting for the promotion that never comes. The professional who knows they are ready for AVP — but can't seem to get the right interview.

EMINEUS Career Leadership is not about CV fixing. It is about strategic positioning.

✦

Your CV is not getting you interviews at Senior Manager level — because it reads like a job description, not a leadership narrative

✦

Your salary is not growing because you don't have a negotiation strategy — you accept what is offered

✦

Your next move to AVP needs a 5-year roadmap — not just a better CV

🏆 EMINEUS Legacy Profile — Bharat

"The work was real. The awards were real. The late nights were real. Now make the world see it — for real."

5, 8, 10 years — or even longer — in the same company. That kind of loyalty deserves a standing ovation. And a profile the world can finally see. Your awards, your milestones, your journey — one beautiful shareable page.

Why this package exists

You worked hard in Gulf. You built real experience. But India employers don't see it — yet. This package translates your Gulf career into India market language — so you get the recognition and salary you deserve.

Returning to India from Gulf is one of the most underserved career transitions. Your GCC experience is valuable — but India employers often don't understand it. This package bridges that gap.

THE REAL PROBLEM

India recruiters see "worked in Gulf" and don't know what to do with it. Your GCC experience sounds foreign to them — even though it is more valuable than they realise.

THE SOLUTION

EMINEUS Re-Entry Support rebuilds your positioning — translating Gulf experience into India market language that recruiters immediately understand and value.

STILL IN GCC?

Planning to return in next 6-12 months? See G-05 — GCC to Bharat Pre-Return Planning (AED 2,750) — prepare before you land.

ALREADY SEARCHING 3+ MONTHS?

See the Urgent Re-Entry package below — faster delivery, emergency CV audit, 50+ employers hiring Gulf returnees right now.

✈️ GCC Packages — AED Pricing

Gulf — G-05
GCC to Bharat — Pre-Return Planning
AED 2,750 one time
Still in Gulf — planning return to India
Still in Gulf? Planning to return to India soon? Most professionals wait until they land in India — and then struggle for months. Don't make that mistake. Arrive prepared — not confused.
— Prepare before you land —
  • 120-day structured transition plan — Gulf decision to India job offer
  • Phase 1 (Day 1–60) — Prepare in Gulf: CV, research, applications
  • Phase 2 (Day 61–120) — Transition: notice period, India groundwork
  • Phase 3 (Day 61–120) — Land in India: interviews, offers, negotiate
  • CV adaptation — GCC to India format
  • Top India employers list — Gulf returnees
  • GCC vs India salary benchmark 2026
  • Full India re-entry career profile website
  • 2 sessions × 1 hour each — Zoom
  • 30-day WhatsApp support
  • Delivery in 5–7 working days
WhatsApp support covers: India re-entry plan queries, target company guidance, CV queries (up to 2 rounds), certification & salary guidance. Response within 24 hours Mon–Fri. Sat–Sun responded by Monday. No additional sessions or new deliverables included.
Book Now →
YOUR 180-DAY RETURN JOURNEY

Most professionals plan their Gulf return too late. This package helps you prepare 6 months before — so you land in India with a job offer, not a job search.

🟡 PHASE 1 — DAY 1–60

Still in Gulf — CV rebuild, India market research, target company list, start applications remotely

🟡 PHASE 2 — DAY 61–120

Transition period — serve notice, build India connections, attend interviews remotely, plan relocation

🟢 PHASE 3 — DAY 61–120

Land in India — active interviews, negotiate offer, secure position before savings run out

⚠️ Most Gulf returnees wait until they land in India to start planning. By then it is too late. This package is for professionals who plan ahead — and arrive ready.

🏆 EMINEUS GCC Legacy Profile

5, 8, 10 years — or even longer — in the same company. That kind of loyalty deserves a standing ovation. And a profile the world can finally see.

"The work was real. The awards were real. The late nights were real. Now make the world see it — for real."
🇮🇳 EXCLUSIVELY FOR INDIAN PROFESSIONALS IN GCC · LIMITED 2 SLOTS PER MONTH
WHO THIS IS FOR

5, 8, 10 years in UAE, KSA, Bahrain or Oman. Awards from company events sitting in your mobile. Colleagues respect you. Your manager knows your worth. But outside your company — nobody knows your Gulf story.

Every restless evening — scrolling LinkedIn — watching others get recognised. Thinking — I have done so much here. Nobody sees it. EMINEUS GCC Legacy Profile changes that. Your entire Gulf journey — one beautiful shareable page. Ready for your next GCC employer, your next opportunity, your next chapter.

Europe Aspiration Packages

Your path from India → GCC → Europe

A structured 5-year roadmap. Phase 1 — GCC first. Build experience, certifications and language skills in UAE, KSA or Bahrain. Phase 2 — Europe next. Cross into Europe with the right CV, right language, right visa. All packages ₹12,999.

🇦🇪
FIRST DESTINATION — GCC
UAE · Dubai · Abu Dhabi · Sharjah  |  🇸🇦 KSA · Riyadh · Jeddah  |  🇧🇭 Bahrain · Manama  |  🇴🇲 Oman · Muscat  |  🇶🇦 Qatar · Doha  |  🇰🇼 Kuwait
Tax-free salary · International experience · Language prep · Certification building — all in GCC first
→ 🌍
🗣️ ARABIC LANGUAGE — YOUR GCC ADVANTAGE
Even basic Arabic — greetings, workplace phrases — dramatically improves your GCC interview success rate and workplace integration.
Arabic on your CV — listed as "Elementary/Conversational" — is a visible differentiator for Insurance, Finance and Back Office roles in UAE and KSA.
GCC employers notice — Indian professionals who invest even 3–6 months in Arabic basics signal commitment and cultural fit — a major advantage over other candidates.
Recommended: Duolingo Arabic (free) + YouTube Gulf Arabic basics + 1 Arabic phrase per day practice. A2 level in 6–9 months is achievable alongside full-time work.
🎓 GENERAL SUBJECT GRADUATES — YOUR PATH TO GCC AND EUROPE

BA · BCom · BSc · BCA · BBA — any stream. You do not need an MBA or a Finance degree to build a career in GCC and Europe. What you need is the right certifications, the right positioning and a structured plan.

Step 1 — India (0–1 yr)
Get your first job in Insurance Ops, Back Office, Finance Support or BFSI. Any role. Even entry level. Build 1 year of experience.
Step 2 — Certify (Year 1–2)
AML/KYC · AINS · Lean Six Sigma Yellow Belt. These 3 certifications alone open GCC doors for general graduates in Insurance and Finance.
Step 3 — GCC Move (Year 2–3)
With 1–2 yrs exp + certifications + GCC-format CV = strong profile for UAE, KSA or Bahrain entry-level to mid roles. Tax-free salary begins here.
Step 4 — GCC Growth (Year 3–5)
Build GCC experience. Add advanced certs. Learn target Europe language. Save GCC salary. Build your Europe application profile simultaneously.
Step 5 — Europe Entry (Year 5+)
GCC experience + certs + language = Europe-ready profile. Apply to Germany, Netherlands, Portugal or Czech Republic with a rebuilt Europe-format CV.
🌍 ALL 21 EUROPEAN TARGET COUNTRIES — VISA SIMPLICITY GUIDE
✅ EASIEST ENTRY — English Sufficient
🇳🇱 Netherlands — English widely accepted in firms
🇵🇹 Portugal — D3 Visa · very friendly for non-EU
🇨🇿 Czech Republic — Employee Card · English in MNCs
🇮🇪 Ireland — English · common law system like India
🇭🇺 Hungary — growing BFSI hub · easy residency
🇩🇪 GERMAN LANGUAGE TRACK
🇩🇪 Germany — EU Blue Card · A2-B1 German required
🇨🇭 Switzerland — L/B Permit · employer sponsored
🇦🇹 Austria — Red-White-Red Card · skilled migration
🇱🇺 Luxembourg — German + French both valued
🇫🇷 FRENCH LANGUAGE TRACK
🇱🇺 Luxembourg — EU Finance Capital · French required
🇫🇷 France — Talent Passport Visa for skilled workers
🇧🇪 Belgium — bilingual · French + Dutch · BFSI hub
🇨🇭 Switzerland — French in Geneva/Lausanne finance
🌊 NORDIC TRACK — English Accepted
🇳🇴 Norway — Work Permit · English accepted in firms
🇸🇪 Sweden — Work Permit · English in international cos
🇩🇰 Denmark — Green Card scheme · Finance roles
🇮🇸 Iceland — small market · easy integration
☀️ SOUTHERN EUROPE TRACK
🇪🇸 Spain — Non-Lucrative + Digital Nomad Visa
🇮🇹 Italy — Decree Flows · annual skilled worker quota
🇬🇷 Greece — Digital Nomad Visa · growing tech+finance
🇵🇱 Poland — growing economy · BFSI back office
🇹🇷 Turkey — EU candidate · bridge between GCC+Europe
🇬🇧 UNITED KINGDOM — SPECIAL NOTE
Post-Brexit Skilled Worker Visa · English only · Strong Insurance + Finance market in London. GCC experience highly valued. CII certification (UK) is the strongest credential for this route.

The EMINEUS Strategy

The 2-Phase Plan — GCC to Europe

Europe does not hire freshers from India directly. But it does recognise GCC experience. The 2-Phase Strategy uses GCC as the bridge — building your credentials, international experience and language skills — before making the move to Europe.

PHASE 1 — YEARS 1 TO 3

🇦🇪 Work in GCC — Build the Foundation

The first 3 years are spent building the international experience, certifications and language skills that Europe will demand. GCC is not a detour — it is the launch pad.

💼
Build International CV
GCC employment = international credibility. European employers recognise UAE and KSA-listed experience.
📜
Earn GCC Certifications
AML/KYC, Risk Management, ACCA, CFA foundation — certifications that are equally recognised in Europe.
🗣️
Learn Target Language
German for Germany and Switzerland, Dutch for Netherlands, French for Luxembourg. Begin during GCC years.
💰
Build Financial Runway
Tax-free GCC savings fund the Europe move. 3 years of GCC salary creates a real financial buffer.
↓
PHASE 2 — YEAR 3 ONWARDS

🌍 Transition to Europe — GCC as Your Bridge

From Year 3, the transition begins. Your GCC experience is now your advantage — European employers see international exposure, not just an India CV. This is where the 5-year plan pays off.

🇩🇪
Germany — EU Blue Card
Finance, Insurance Ops, Back Office. German language A2–B1 + GCC experience = strong profile.
🇳🇱
Netherlands — English-Friendly
Amsterdam BFSI hub. English is sufficient for most roles. GCC experience is well-recognised.
🇵🇹
Portugal — English Accepted
Lisbon tech and finance hub. English-first environment. Visa-friendly for non-EU professionals.
🇨🇿
Czech Republic — Growing Hub
Prague — fast-growing BFSI shared services hub. English widely used in international firms.
🇨🇭
Switzerland — Premium Finance
Zurich and Geneva. German/French. Highest salaries in Europe for Insurance and Finance professionals.
🇱🇺
Luxembourg — Finance Capital
EU's financial centre. French language. Insurance and Fund Operations roles in high demand.
Australia Aspiration Packages

Your path from India → GCC → Australia PR

A structured 5 year roadmap. Phase 1 — GCC first. Build international experience, certifications and savings. Phase 2 — Australia next. Apply with the right points, right skills assessment, right state nomination.

🇦🇪
FIRST DESTINATION — GCC
🇦🇪 UAE · Dubai · Abu Dhabi  |  🇸🇦 KSA · Riyadh · Jeddah  |  🇧🇭 Bahrain  |  🇴🇲 Oman  |  🇶🇦 Qatar  |  🇰🇼 Kuwait
Tax-free savings · International experience · Skills assessment head start — all in GCC first
→ 🌏
🗣️ ARABIC LANGUAGE — YOUR GCC ADVANTAGE
Basic Arabic during GCC Phase 1 — greetings, workplace phrases — dramatically improves your GCC interview success rate and workplace integration. Helps you land a better GCC role faster.
Arabic on your CV — even Elementary level — signals commitment to the Gulf market. More senior GCC role = more savings = stronger Australia application.
Recommended: Duolingo Arabic (free) + YouTube Gulf Arabic basics. A2 level in 6–9 months alongside full-time work is achievable and worth every minute.
🎓 GENERAL SUBJECT GRADUATES — YOUR PATH TO GCC AND AUSTRALIA PR

BA · BCom · BSc · BCA · BBA — any stream. Australia is a points-based system. Your degree subject matters less than your skills assessment, IELTS score, age and years of experience. Every point counts — and most general graduates are closer to 65 points than they think.

Step 1 — India (0–1 yr)
First job in Insurance, Finance or Back Office. Any entry level role. Build 1 year of relevant experience. Start IELTS preparation.
Step 2 — Certify + IELTS (Year 1–2)
IELTS 7+ in each band = 10 points alone. AML/KYC + Lean Six Sigma Yellow Belt. These open GCC doors for general graduates.
Step 3 — GCC Move (Year 2–4)
Land GCC role. Tax-free salary starts. Skills assessment body identified. Points calculated. EOI strategy planned from GCC base.
Step 4 — Apply Australia (Year 4–6)
Submit EOI on SkillSelect. State nomination strategy (190/491). Invitation to apply. Visa granted. Australia PR in hand.

📥 Download Excel Tracker on WhatsApp →
The EMINEUS Strategy

The PR Pathway — GCC to Australia

Australia does not give PR based on connections or interviews alone. It gives PR based on points. The EMINEUS 2-Phase Strategy builds your points profile in GCC first — then submits your strongest possible application.

📊 HOW THE POINTS SYSTEM WORKS — 65 POINTS NEEDED
🎂 Age (max 30 pts)
18–24 = 25 pts · 25–32 = 30 pts · 33–39 = 25 pts · 40–44 = 15 pts. Apply early — age points drop fast.
🎓 Education (max 20 pts)
PhD = 20 pts · Bachelor/Master = 15 pts · Diploma = 10 pts. Australian qualification adds 5 bonus points.
💼 Experience (max 20 pts)
Overseas exp — 3–4 yrs = 5 pts · 5–7 yrs = 10 pts · 8+ yrs = 15 pts. Australian exp adds up to 20 pts.
🗣️ IELTS/PTE (max 20 pts)
Competent = 0 pts · Proficient (7+) = 10 pts · Superior (8+) = 20 pts. This is the fastest way to add points.
🏛️ State Nomination (5 pts)
190 visa — state nomination adds 5 guaranteed points. SA · TAS · ACT actively nominate Finance + Insurance professionals.
💑 Spouse Points (5 pts)
Skilled spouse adds 5 pts · single applicants get 10 pts bonus. Smart planning here can add significant points.
VISA SUBCLASS 189

Independent Skilled Visa

No state nomination needed. Live and work anywhere in Australia permanently. Requires higher points — usually 80–90+ in current rounds. Best for professionals with high IELTS scores and strong experience. Permanent residency from day one.

VISA SUBCLASS 190

State Nominated Visa

Nominated by an Australian state or territory. Adds 5 guaranteed points. Must commit to living in nominating state for 2 years. SA, TAS and ACT are the most accessible for Finance and Insurance professionals. Most popular route for Indian professionals.

VISA SUBCLASS 491

Regional Skilled Visa

Live and work in regional Australia for 3 years. Adds 15 points — the most of any single category. Fastest way to reach 65+ points for many Indian professionals. After 3 years regional — eligible for permanent PR (subclass 191).

🗺️ AUSTRALIAN STATES — WHERE TO TARGET
🏙️ New South Wales — Sydney
Australia's Finance Capital. Insurance, Banking, BFSI hub. Highest salaries. Most competitive — but highest number of Indian professionals already settled here.
🌆 Victoria — Melbourne
Strong Back Office and Operations sector. Large Indian community. Lower cost than Sydney. State nomination available for skilled professionals.
☀️ Queensland — Brisbane
Fast-growing economy. Lower cost of living than Sydney/Melbourne. Strong state nomination program. Great for Insurance Ops and Finance professionals.
🌊 Western Australia — Perth
Booming economy. Resources + Finance sector. Active state nomination. Closer to India time zone. Strong Indian community growing rapidly.
🍷 South Australia — Adelaide
Best for 491 regional visa. Active state nomination. Lower competition. Lower cost of living. Fastest route to PR for many Indian Finance professionals.
🏛️ ACT — Canberra
Government + Finance roles. Active state nomination. Smaller city — easier to get noticed. Excellent quality of life and community integration.
🌿 Tasmania — Hobart
Easiest 491 regional pathway. Very active nomination program. Stunning lifestyle. Small but growing Finance community. Ideal stepping stone to PR.
Australia career intelligence

Australia Career Guidance

🏙️ Sydney NSW
Australia's Finance Capital — Insurance + BFSI hub
🌆 Melbourne VIC
Back Office + Operations + Finance — strong Indian community
☀️ Brisbane QLD
Fast-growing — lower cost — active state nomination
🌊 Perth WA
Booming economy — closest to India time zone
WHY AUSTRALIA NOW?

Australia is facing a critical skilled worker shortage across Finance, Insurance and Back Office sectors. The government has expanded its skilled migration intake. Indian professionals are among the most preferred applicants — English fluency, strong qualifications and GCC international experience are all valued highly in the points system.

POINTS REALITY

65 points gets you into the pool. 70–80 points gets you invited. Most Indian professionals aged 25–35 with 3+ years experience and IELTS 7+ are already at 60–65 points — closer than they think. One IELTS improvement or state nomination can push you over the threshold immediately.

IELTS/PTE MATTERS MOST

IELTS 7+ in each band = 10 points. IELTS 8+ in each band = 20 points. This is the single fastest and most controllable way to add significant points to your profile. Indian professionals typically underestimate their IELTS potential — with structured preparation, 7+ is very achievable for most Finance and Operations professionals.

STATE NOMINATION STRATEGY

190 visa = 5 extra points + state nomination. SA · TAS · ACT actively nominate Indian Finance and Insurance professionals. Strategic state choice can fast-track your PR invitation by 12–18 months. 491 regional visa adds 15 points — the highest single boost available in the entire system.

Australia salary benchmarks — 2026

What Indian professionals earn across Australia

ROLE STATE / CITY SALARY / YEAR AUD
Finance / Back Office Executive🏙️ Sydney NSWAUD 65,000 – 90,000
Insurance Operations Manager🌆 Melbourne VICAUD 85,000 – 120,000
Senior Finance Analyst🏙️ Sydney NSWAUD 90,000 – 130,000
Compliance Officer BFSI🌆 Melbourne VICAUD 80,000 – 115,000
Back Office Operations Manager☀️ Brisbane QLDAUD 75,000 – 105,000
Risk Management Professional🌊 Perth WAAUD 85,000 – 120,000
Operations Executive🍷 Adelaide SAAUD 60,000 – 80,000

Figures are indicative based on market research 2026. Actual salaries vary by employer, experience and negotiation.

Tax-free income — no income tax
5 Yr
Deep GCC market research base

UAE — Dubai · Abu Dhabi · Sharjah · KSA — Riyadh · Jeddah · Dammam · Bahrain — Manama · Oman — Muscat · Qatar — Doha · Kuwait — Kuwait City — all 6 GCC markets covered

Insurance Operations is one of the most in-demand sectors for Indian professionals in GCC

ATS systems in GCC are different — your India CV often fails automatically without a GCC rebuild

Tax-free salary in AED can be 2–3x your India package in equivalent purchasing power

WHY GCC NOW?

UAE Vision 2030, KSA NEOM and Bahrain FinTech Hub are driving massive Insurance, Finance and Back Office hiring across GCC in 2026. The window is open — but it will not stay open forever.

INDIAN PROFESSIONALS ADVANTAGE

4.75 million Indians already work in UAE. Indian professionals are preferred in Insurance Ops, Back Office and Finance roles across GCC — but only with the right CV and positioning.

GCC ATS REALITY

Gulf job portals use different ATS systems. Your India CV format fails automatically — before any human sees it. A GCC-format rebuild significantly increases your callback rate.

TAX-FREE ADVANTAGE

AED 10,000/month tax-free ≈ ₹2.2 lakh/month. The same role in India at ₹18–22 LPA gives ₹1.2–1.5 lakh/month after tax. GCC salary is not just higher — it is a different financial reality.

Europe career intelligence

Europe Career Guidance

🇩🇪 Germany
Largest EU economy — top Finance & Insurance hub
🇳🇱 Netherlands
Amsterdam BFSI centre — English-friendly
🇨🇭 Switzerland
Highest salaries in Europe — Zurich Finance hub
🇱🇺 Luxembourg
EU Financial Capital — Fund & Insurance ops

🇩🇪 Germany · Switzerland · Austria — German language A2–B1 opens doors · 🇳🇱 Netherlands — English widely accepted · 🇵🇹 Portugal · 🇨🇿 Czech Republic — English sufficient · 🇱🇺 Luxembourg — French required

🔵 EU Blue Card — fast-track work permit for skilled non-EU professionals · available across most EU member states

🌉 GCC experience is your bridge — European employers recognise UAE and KSA-listed international experience as strong credibility

💶 EUR salary is real take-home — Netherlands, Portugal, Czech Republic offer lower tax rates — purchasing power is strong

WHY EUROPE NOW?

The EU is facing the biggest skilled worker shortage in its history. Germany alone needs 400,000 skilled workers every year. Netherlands, Luxembourg and Switzerland are actively hiring Insurance, Finance and Back Office professionals. The window is open — and Indian professionals with GCC experience are perfectly positioned.

INDIAN PROFESSIONALS ADVANTAGE

GCC experience is your international credibility bridge. European employers see UAE and KSA-listed experience as genuine global exposure. The EU Blue Card pathway is designed for skilled professionals earning above the salary threshold. Indian professionals in Insurance, Finance and Operations are in demand across Germany, Netherlands and Luxembourg.

LANGUAGE REALITY

German A2–B1 for Germany and Switzerland — begin during GCC Phase 1. Dutch for Netherlands — English widely accepted in international firms. French for Luxembourg and Belgium. English is fully sufficient for Portugal and Czech Republic. Language preparation during GCC years is the smartest move — arrive Europe-ready.

VISA PATHWAY

EU Blue Card — valid across most EU countries · tied to job offer above salary threshold · fastest route.
Portugal D3 Visa — skilled worker friendly · easiest EU entry point.
Czech Employee Card — non-EU nationals · growing Prague BFSI hub.
Switzerland L/B Permit — employer sponsored · Zurich/Geneva Finance roles.

Europe salary benchmarks — 2026

What Indian professionals earn across Europe

ROLE COUNTRY SALARY / MONTH
Finance / Back Office Executive🇩🇪 Germany€3,500 – 5,500
Senior Finance Analyst🇳🇱 Netherlands€4,500 – 7,000
Insurance Ops Manager🇨🇭 SwitzerlandCHF 8,000 – 13,000
Back Office Manager🇱🇺 Luxembourg€5,500 – 9,000
Compliance Officer BFSI🇩🇪 Germany€4,500 – 7,500
Operations Executive🇵🇹 Portugal€1,800 – 3,200
Finance Manager🇨🇿 Czech RepublicCZK 80,000 – 130,000

Figures are indicative based on market research 2026. Actual salaries vary by employer, experience and negotiation.

The difference

Why a dedicated website
changes everything

❌ Without a career website

  • ✗ LinkedIn profile — one of millions

  • ✗ No way to showcase projects or achievements
  • ✗ Salary negotiation from a weak position

✅ With your EMINEUS website

  • ✓ Your own URL — professional and memorable
  • ✓ Complete control over your personal brand
  • ✓ India recruiters can see everything in one place
  • ✓ Stand out from 99% of India applicants
  • ✓ Showcase certifications, projects, timelines

❌ Without a GCC career website

  • ✗ No GCC-specific personal brand
  • ✗ Gulf recruiters cannot find you easily
  • ✗ Generic Bayt/Naukrigulf profile — no differentiation
  • ✗ No way to showcase GCC certifications or achievements
  • ✗ Salary negotiation from a weak position

✅ With your EMINEUS GCC website

WHO WE ARE

Mission · Vision · Values

MISSION

"To give every ambitious professional the plan they always deserved."

Most professionals are not held back by lack of talent — they are held back by lack of a plan. EMINEUS bridges the gap between where you are and where you deserve to be. One plan. Built for you. Built for the world.

VISION

"Every professional deserves an international career. EMINEUS makes that possible."

No professional should ever be held back by lack of a plan. EMINEUS exists to be the trusted global career partner for every professional who dares to dream beyond borders — beyond the ceiling — beyond the ordinary.

— OUR VALUES —
01
Real Experience.
Real Guidance.

Honest.
Always.
No false promises. No guaranteed visa claims. Just honest truth and a precise plan.

The Plan is
Everything.
Great careers are built on strategy, timing and right positioning — not luck.
04
Your Success
is Personal.
Every client is different. Every plan is different. We never copy-paste.
05
Global.
Always.
India. GCC. Europe. Australia. The world is the canvas. EMINEUS gives you the tools.

Legal & Advisory Notice
Advisory Services Disclaimer
EMINEUS by Faiz Abdullah · Effective: 2026 · India · GCC · Europe · Australia

Nature of Services

EMINEUS by Faiz Abdullah ("Service Provider") provides career planning, CV preparation, salary benchmarking, career guidance and international career orientation services. All services are strictly advisory and informational in nature only. The Service Provider draws on 19 years of professional experience to offer guidance. This does not constitute legal, financial, immigration or professional certification advice of any kind.

International Services — Europe & Australia

EMINEUS Europe and EMINEUS Australia services are designed exclusively for Indian nationals seeking career guidance and international career orientation. These services provide career planning, roadmap building, CV preparation and general migration pathway orientation only. EMINEUS is not a registered immigration consultant, visa agent, MARA-registered migration agent (Australia) or EU-licensed immigration adviser (Europe). No service provided by EMINEUS constitutes formal immigration advice, visa application assistance or legal migration counsel. Clients are solely responsible for their own visa applications and are advised to consult a registered immigration professional for formal visa and migration matters.

No Guarantee of Outcomes

The Service Provider makes no representation, warranty or guarantee — express or implied — regarding employment outcomes, visa approvals, interview calls, salary increases, promotions, migration success or any other career or immigration result. All outcomes depend entirely on individual effort, qualifications, market conditions, employer decisions, immigration authorities and numerous factors beyond the Service Provider's control.

Salary Benchmarks

Salary figures shared are indicative only, based on market research and publicly available information as of 2026. Actual salary offers may vary significantly by employer, location, negotiation and individual profile. The Service Provider is not responsible for any discrepancy between indicated and actual salary figures.

Employer & Contact Information

Company names, HR email IDs and recruitment agency information are provided in good faith based on research available at time of service delivery. The Service Provider does not guarantee accuracy of contact details as these change frequently. Clients are advised to independently verify all contacts before use.

Payment & Refund Policy

100% payment is required upfront before service commencement. No refund will be provided once service delivery has commenced. In the event of non-delivery by the Service Provider, a full refund will be issued within 7 working days. Disputes must be raised within 48 hours of delivery. Indian clients — payment via UPI QR code. International clients (GCC · Europe · Australia) — payment details shared via WhatsApp upon package confirmation.

Confidentiality

All client information shared — CV, personal details, career goals — is treated with strict confidentiality and will not be shared with any third party without explicit client consent. Data is collected solely for service delivery purposes.

Governing Law & Jurisdiction

All services are provided from India. This disclaimer and all service agreements are governed by the laws of India. Any disputes shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of courts in Delhi, India. All clients — including international clients — acknowledge and accept this jurisdiction by making payment.

Acceptance of Terms: By making payment for any EMINEUS service through any channel — WhatsApp, website or otherwise — the client confirms they have read, understood and fully accepted this disclaimer in its entirety. This disclaimer governs all services rendered by EMINEUS by Faiz Abdullah across all modes — Bharat · Gulf · Europe · Australia.
EMINEUS by Faiz Abdullah · www.emineus.online · +91 9560003751 · emineus@proton.me · Delhi NCR, India

YOUR DETAILS OPEN WHATSAPP · NOT STORED ANYWHERE

The Honest Truth — Before Anything Else

Why Most Rejections Really Happen

It is almost never bad luck. It is almost always one of these six reasons. And every single one is fixable.

📄
REASON 01
CV Filtered Before Human Eyes
ATS software rejected your CV before any recruiter saw it. Wrong format, wrong keywords, wrong file. You never stood a chance.
🎯
REASON 02
Wrong Target Companies
Applied to 50 wrong companies instead of 10 right ones. Shotgun approach never works. Precision targeting is the only method that does.
💬
REASON 03
Interview Presentation Gap
Strong experience, weak storytelling. No STAR method. Vague answers when specific ones were needed. Skills were there — delivery was not.
💰
REASON 04
Salary Expectation Mismatch
Asked too high or too low without market data. Salary negotiation is a skill. Without a benchmark you are guessing — and guessing costs offers.
📋
REASON 05
Certification or Skill Gap
The role required CAMS, Six Sigma or PMP. A competitor had the same experience plus the credential. They got the offer. You did not.
🔗
REASON 06
Weak LinkedIn Presence
Recruiter checked LinkedIn after shortlisting your CV. What they found did not match. Inconsistent profile. No activity. Outdated photo. Instant red flag.
Every single one of these is fixable. That is exactly what RISE 120 does.
Special Programme · Bharat Only

Rejected Today.
Hired in 120.

You were strong enough to get to the final round.
You just needed the right plan. RISE 120 gives you exactly that.

WITHOUT RISE 120

✗6 months pass — confidence gone — still no offer
WITH RISE 120

Everything Included

RISE 120 — Complete Package

12 deliverables. One price. No job guarantee — but your next attempt will be a completely different candidate.

01
Rejection Diagnosis Report
Written analysis of exactly why you were rejected. Honest. No sugarcoating.
02
Full CV Rebuild — ATS 100/100
New format, new keywords, tailored to your target role. PDF + Word.
03
LinkedIn Profile Overhaul
Headline, summary, experience rewritten for recruiter visibility.
04
Target Company List — 50 Revised
Remove wrong companies. Add right ones. Precision over volume.
05

India salary data by domain and seniority. Know your value before you negotiate.
06

What to do, when to apply, what to fix, what to learn — every week mapped.
07
🤖 AI-Powered Certification Roadmap
AI generates personalised certification plan — which certs, which order, which timeline — based on your domain and rejection profile.
08
STAR Interview Framework + 10 Q&A
Written guide with 10 practice questions and model answers for your domain.
09
Job Application Tracker — Excel
50 target companies with status columns, follow-up dates, contact names.
10
Rejection Response Email Template
Professional email to send back requesting feedback — turns rejection into data.
11
1-Page Career Profile Website
Shareable career link. Bypass ATS. Less than 1% of Indian candidates have one.
12
2 Zoom Sessions + 20-Day WhatsApp
Day 1 diagnosis + Day 60 review. Direct WhatsApp access throughout 20 days.

Questions

RISE 120 — FAQ

Is this a job placement service?
No. RISE 120 is career advisory and comeback planning. I help you diagnose the rejection, fix the gaps, and build a stronger profile. Getting the job is your effort — this plan makes that effort work.
Do you guarantee a job in 120 days?
No guarantee. Some rejections are beyond anyone's control — hiring freeze, budget cuts, internal candidates. What RISE 120 guarantees is that your next attempt will be a significantly stronger version of you. The rest depends on your effort.
I was rejected months ago. Can I still join?
Yes. There is no time limit on rejection recovery. If you have not fixed the root cause, the next attempt will likely end the same way. RISE 120 is relevant whenever you are ready to take it seriously.
How is this different from a regular career package?
Regular packages help you start a job search. RISE 120 starts with a diagnosis of your specific rejection. Everything that follows is built around that diagnosis — not a generic plan.
How do I pay and what happens after?
Pay ₹16,999 via UPI to 9560003751-4@ybl. Screenshot and send to WhatsApp +91 9560003751 with your CV. Faiz confirms within 24 hours and your first Zoom session is scheduled.
Which domains are covered?
Insurance Ops · Finance Ops · Back Office · HR Operations · Risk Management · AML/KYC · Supply Chain. If your domain is outside this list, WhatsApp Faiz first — he will tell you honestly if RISE 120 is the right fit before you pay.
RISE 120 IS BUILT BY
Faiz Abdullah
Senior Manager · Insurance Operations · 19 Years · 18 Countries · Delhi NCR
I have seen talented Indian professionals get rejected not because they lacked skill — but because nobody told them what was actually wrong. RISE 120 exists to fix that. One honest diagnosis. One structured plan. 120 days.
Ask Faiz — WhatsApp → Start RISE 120 ↑
🔴
RISE 120 Advisor
● ONLINE · REJECTION RECOVERY
Common Questions

Frequently Asked Questions

Is this a visa or immigration service?
No. EMINEUS is a career advisory and planning service — not a visa or immigration consultancy. I help you understand pathways, build your profile, and create a plan. For actual visa filing you will need a licensed immigration agent. I can advise on what to prepare — not file on your behalf.
How do I pay? Are there EMI options?
Payment is 100% upfront via UPI / bank transfer (India) or international transfer (GCC/Europe/Australia clients). All prices are in INR. No EMI currently — but the packages are priced to be accessible. If budget is a concern, the Foundation package (B-00 / G-01 / EV-01 / AUS-01) is the best starting point.
How are sessions delivered? I'm outside India.
All sessions are on Zoom. You can be anywhere in the world — India, Dubai, Riyadh, Germany, Australia. Scheduling is done on WhatsApp. All written deliverables (CV, roadmap, strategy document) are shared on email or WhatsApp.
How long does delivery take after I pay?
Typically 3–7 working days for document deliverables (CV rebuild, roadmap). The first Zoom session is usually scheduled within 48 hours of payment. Complex packages (Gulf G-04/G-05, Europe EV-02) take a bit longer due to depth of work.
I'm not in Insurance or Finance. Can you still help?
Yes — my core expertise is Insurance Ops, Finance Ops, Back Office, Compliance, HR Ops, and Risk. If you're in one of these domains or adjacent, I can help. If your profile is very different (e.g. engineering, IT, medicine) I'll tell you honestly upfront before you pay.
I have a career gap. Will that hurt my chances?
Career gaps are very common — especially for women returning after a break, or professionals who took time to upskill. I address this directly in the CV rebuild and interview prep. A gap handled correctly in a CV is far less damaging than people fear. Let's talk before you assume it's a dealbreaker.
What if I'm not satisfied with the service?
I don't make promises I can't keep — no guaranteed job offers, no guaranteed visa. What I do promise is complete effort, honest advice, and professional work. If something genuinely falls short of what was agreed, message me and we'll resolve it. My reputation is built on trust, not contracts.
EMINEUS
THE WORLD MOVES FOR THOSE WHO PLAN.

Career planning, CV rebuilding and GCC relocation guidance for Insurance, Finance and Back Office professionals. Pan India — Delhi NCR, Mumbai, Bangalore and all metros. Fully online via WhatsApp and Zoom.

GCC career guidance for Insurance, Finance, Back Office, Claims Processing, Policy Administration, Underwriting Support, HR Operations & Telecom professionals. UAE — Dubai · Abu Dhabi · Sharjah · KSA — Riyadh · Jeddah · Dammam · Bahrain — Manama · Oman — Muscat · Qatar — Doha · Kuwait City. Delivered via Zoom worldwide.

Europe Aspiration — 5-year GCC to Europe roadmap for Indian professionals. 21 European countries — German · English · French · Nordic tracks. India · GCC · Europe · Online — Delivered via Zoom Worldwide.

Australia Aspiration — 5 year GCC to Australia PR roadmap for Indian professionals. New South Wales · Victoria · Queensland · Western Australia · South Australia — all major states covered. 189 · 190 · 491 visa pathways. Delivered via Zoom Worldwide.

RISE 120 — Rejection recovery programme for Indian professionals. Structured 120-day comeback plan. Bharat Edition · ₹16,999 · Advisory only · No job guarantee.
